Cultivate Studio
Chef Intelligence &
Flavor Matrix Tool
Two Systems. One Intelligence Platform.
Analyse a Menu ⬡
Upload or paste any menu. Receive a full flavour architecture report — scores, clashes, gaps, and chef-level recommendations.
Chef Intelligence Library
Six layers of culinary knowledge embedded into every AI output — terroir, technique, fermentation, identity, sustainability, hospitality.
Menu Report
Detailed menu analysis using both the Flavor Matrix and Chef Intelligence — balance score, section review, and priority actions.
About Cultivate Studio
The philosophy, four pillars, and the vision behind Cultivate Studio.
Six Layers of Culinary Intelligence
Every chef and philosophy below is permanently embedded into Cultivate AI. When you build a menu or run a flavour report, the AI draws from all six layers simultaneously — terroir, technique, fermentation, cultural identity, sustainability, and luxury hotel operations. Click any layer to expand.
Flavour Matrix ⬡
The Flavour Matrix is a scientific model of how flavours relate — what pairs naturally, what creates productive tension, and what clashes. It is built from food chemistry research, fermentation science, and the published work of the world's leading culinary scientists and chefs.
20+ Flavour Nodes
Primary tastes, secondary aromatics, and tertiary complexity — from Sweet and Umami to Fermented Acid and Kokumi.
12 Pairing Rules
Science-backed affinities: Acid+Fat, Salt+Sweet, Umami+Fermented — rated by strength and explained with culinary context.
8 Tension Rules
Clashes to avoid and contrasts to manage — Smoke vs Floral, Marine vs Earthy. Every rule checked against your menu.
Expert Sources
Curated from leading food science research and culinary literature — continuously updated. Contact Cultivate Studio for source details.
How to use it: Upload or paste any menu below — tasting, à la carte, concept, or work in progress. The Matrix analyses every dish against all 20+ nodes, identifies what flavour dimensions are overdone or missing, detects tension clashes, and gives you chef-level recommendations to strengthen the menu. The analysis also cross-references the Chef Intelligence Library (40+ world-class chefs) for philosophical alignment.
Analyse Your Menu
TXT · HTML · PDF · DOCX
Flavour Matrix analysing your menu architecture...

Menu Flavour Architecture Report
Paste any menu. Cultivate AI analyses the full flavour architecture using both the Flavour Matrix (20 nodes, 12 pairings, 8 tension rules) and the Chef Intelligence Library (6 layers, 40+ chefs). The report maps dominant notes, missing dimensions, tension clashes, section-by-section patterns, and gives you specific, chef-level recommendations.
PDF · TXT · HTML · DOCX
Cultivate Studio reading your menu against the Flavour Matrix and Chef Intelligence Library...
Cultivate Studio
Chef Intelligence & Flavor Matrix Platform
Cultivate Studio is a culinary intelligence platform built on four pillars: innovation through tailor thinking, sustainability as a way of life, research and development across fermentation, fire, flavour, beverage and ingredients, and the human touch.
Four Pillars
Innovation Through Tailor Thinking
Every concept, menu and dish built from first principles. No templates. What does this ingredient, this place, this moment actually want to be?
Sustainability as a Way of Life
Embedded in sourcing, waste systems, supplier relationships, and menu design from the first conversation. Not a program — a practice.
Research and Development
Fermentation, fire, flavour, beverage and ingredients are living research areas. The kitchen is a laboratory. Every season opens new questions.
Human Touch
Technology supports the chef but never replaces the craft. Every dish made by human hands, for human experience. The guest always comes first.

Community
Chef network, shared knowledge, collaboration — Coming Soon
The Community is Coming
Cultivate Studio will open to a network of professional chefs, F&B directors, and culinary researchers. What you build here stays private — the community adds a layer of shared intelligence, collaboration, and connection on top of it.
👤
Chef Profiles
Verified profiles for professional chefs and F&B directors. Searchable by cuisine, philosophy, region, and experience. Your profile travels with you across roles.
✓ Your profile is already built
🤝
Chef Network
Connect with chefs who share your philosophy. Follow their research, comment on concepts, propose collaborations. Not social media — professional intelligence exchange.
📚
Shared Knowledge
Chefs post technique discoveries, fermentation logs, foraging finds, ingredient research. Searchable, categorised, peer-reviewed. The internet's missing professional culinary knowledge base.
🌿
Producer Network
Producers submit to a shared, verified directory. Chefs vouch for them. Cross-referenced with sustainability credentials, seasonal availability, and delivery coverage.
✓ Your producer network is already seeded
📊
Benchmarking Pool
Anonymised P&L data from participating hotels and restaurants. Compare your food cost, RevPAC, and GOP against real peers — not just HotStats averages.
🔥
Four Hands Board
A live board of chefs open to collaboration. Post your availability, browse partners, pitch directly. Connected to the Four Hands Connector you already have.
✓ Your pitch builder is ready
Register Your Interest
The community launches when we have the right founding members. If you want early access or want to contribute to shaping it, register below.

Flavour Matrix Admin ⬡
Admin Only · Manage nodes, upload references, manual entries, auto-refresh

How subscriber access works
Step 1 — Someone subscribes
A chef or restaurant pays for a plan (Basic or Pro). Payment happens outside this app — bank transfer, invoice, or Stripe link when you set it up.
Step 2 — You generate a code
Click "Generate Pro Code" or "Generate Basic Code" below. A unique code is created instantly — e.g. CSPRO-AB3X7K. Copy it and send it to your subscriber by email or WhatsApp.
Step 3 — They log in
They open the app, click Sign In, enter the code, and get instant access to their tier. No email, no password reset — just the code. The app remembers them for 30 days.
Important — keep your own records. Codes are saved in this browser only. If you clear your browser or use a different device, the list resets. Write down every code you issue with the subscriber name and plan. A proper subscriber database (Phase 2) will be built when needed.
Basic Plan includes
Cultivate AI · Seasonality · Menu Builder · Recipe Manager · Menu Intelligence · Flavour Matrix (analyse menus) · Producer Network (browse)
Pro Plan adds
P&L Analysis · Strategy · Menu Engineering · Pricing · Benchmarks · Trends · Concepts · Sustainability · Four Hands · Full Flavour Matrix · All downloads
Generate Access Code
Preview the platform exactly as your subscribers see it — without logging out. Switch between Basic and Pro view to check what each tier can access. Your admin session is preserved.
Test Flavour Wheel
Preview as Subscriber
Temporarily switches your view to Basic or Pro mode. Press Restore Admin to return to full access.
